<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Bridal Cascade](11-bridal-cascade.jpg)

Cascade bouquets demand more from the flowers and the florist — heavier blooms at the head, trailing ivy and jasmine at the base. We start with a 30-minute consultation, agree on a palette, and the bouquet is built the night before with that morning's market flowers.

## What's in it

- Centrepiece roses (6–8)
- Trailing jasmine
- Hellebores or lisianthus depending on season
- Ivy and trailing eucalyptus

## Care

Misted and refrigerated overnight. Hand it to the bride 30 minutes before the ceremony — out of water that long is fine, longer isn't.
